title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Settings – Allow Cancellation checkboxes default unchecked
description: AC 01.1 - Equivalence Partitioning: Both Allow Cancellation checkboxes (Directly Added Participants and Booking System Participants) are un-selected by default on a new Master Event.
preconditions: Admin has access to create a new Master Event
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to Master Event creation page"
2. "Locate the Cancellation Settings section"
3. "Check Allow Cancellation for Directly Added Participants checkbox"
4. "Check Allow Cancellation for Booking System Participants checkbox"
steps_result:
1. "Master Event creation page loads"
2. "Cancellation Settings section is displayed"
3. "Checkbox is unchecked (default = false)"
4. "Checkbox is unchecked (default = false)"

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Settings – Enable Allow Cancellation for Directly Added Participants

preconditions: Admin has access to Master Event settings

2. "Check Allow Cancellation for Directly Added Participants"
3. "Save settings"
4. "Re-open Master Event settings"
steps_result:
1. "Settings page loads"
2. "Checkbox is checked"
3. "Settings saved successfully"
4. "Checkbox remains checked"

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Settings – Enable Allow Cancellation for Booking System Participants

4. "Re-open Master Event settings"

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancel Button Visibility – Cancel Type = Cancel shows button on mobile

- Cancellation Type = Cancel
- Event Activity Date/Time is in the future
- Student has booked the event via booking system

3. "Check Cancellation Type value"

2. "Settings page loads"
3. "Cancellation Type = Cancel"

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Deadline – 0 or null means deadline equals event date
description: AC 01.3 - BVA: When cancellation deadline is 0 or null, deadline is the same as the event date.
preconditions:
Master Event has:
- Cancellation Type = Cancel
- Cancellation Deadline = 0
- Event Date = 2026-04-01 09:00 (Event Timezone)
steps_actions:
1. "Login to learner app as student who booked the event"
2. "Open event detail 1 hour before event start"
3. "Check Cancel Reservation button state"
steps_result:
1. "App loads"
2. "Event detail displayed"
3. "Cancel Reservation button is visible and enabled (deadline = event date, current time is before event)"

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Deadline – Correct cutoff calculation
description: AC 01.3 - BVA: Cancellation cutoff = Event Start Datetime minus Cancellation Deadline hours.
preconditions:
Master Event has:
- Cancellation Type = Cancel
- Cancellation Deadline = 24 hours
- Event Date = 2026-04-01 08:00 (Event Timezone)
steps_actions:
1. "Login to learner app at 2026-03-31 07:59 (before cutoff)"
2. "Open event detail and check Cancel Reservation button"
3. "Login to learner app at 2026-03-31 08:01 (after cutoff)"
4. "Open event detail and check Cancel Reservation button"
steps_result:
1. "App loads"
2. "Cancel Reservation button is visible and enabled"
3. "App loads"
4. "Cancel Reservation button is disabled"

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Deadline – Update deadline for in-progress event shows warning
description: AC 01.3 - State Transition: Warning message displayed when updating deadline for an event that has already started.
preconditions:
Master Event has activity events
At least one activity event date <= current date
steps_actions:
1. "Open Master Event settings"
2. "Update Cancellation Deadline value"
3. "Save settings"
steps_result:
1. "Settings page loads"
2. "New deadline value entered"
3. "Message displayed: This event is already in progress. Changes to the cancellation deadline will only apply to activities that have not yet started."

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Deadline – Update deadline confirm recomputes for unstarted activities
description: AC 01.3 - State Transition: Clicking Confirm on the warning recomputes cancellation deadline for unstarted activity events only.
preconditions:
Master Event has:
- 3 activity events: past, today, future
- Current Cancellation Deadline = 24 hours
steps_actions:
1. "Open Master Event settings"
2. "Update Cancellation Deadline to 48 hours"
3. "Click Confirm on the warning message"
4. "Check the cancellation deadline of the future activity event"
steps_result:
1. "Settings page loads"
2. "Warning message displayed"
3. "Deadline recomputed for unstarted activities"
4. "Future activity event has updated cancellation cutoff based on 48 hours"
steps_data:
1. ""
2. "New Cancellation Deadline = 48"
3. ""
4. "Only future activities are recomputed"

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Deadline – Update deadline cancel closes popup without change

title: Cancel Booked Event – Cancellation Deadline – Update for not-started event shows no warning
